product_overview: Roomy is a household management web app for a shared house, helping residents log in and manage tasks, bills, and stock. It also integrates with Telegram automation for house coordination, but only the core web app flows are included here.
core_goals: Sign in to access the household management dashboard
View bills and mark bills as paid

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate into the web app using email and password.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> See dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Leave password incorrect or incomplete -> Submit login form -> See a login validation message

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: Review the main household summary and charts after signing in.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View the dashboard summary and charts

features.name: Task Management
features.description: View household tasks and mark tasks as completed.
user_flows: Navigate to /tarefas -> View list of tasks -> Complete a task -> See the task updated as completed

features.name: Bill Management
features.description: View household bills and mark a bill as paid.
user_flows: Navigate to /contas -> View list of bills -> Mark a bill as paid -> See the bill updated as paid

features.name: Stock Management
features.description: View stock information and check inventory status.
user_flows: Navigate to /estoque -> View stock items and low-stock alerts

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials
